headings: Specialised AI agents. Built for insurance outcomes.
body_sections: Purpose built AI agents that automate insurance journeys, increase conversion, and prove ROI in weeks.
Enterprise ready AI agents designed to operate safely across regulated, high volume insurance workflows.
SAFER ensures every AI agent operates securely, transparently and compliantly — meeting regulatory expectations while delivering consistent, auditable outcomes across live insurance journeys.
From first conversation to live agent. We use a proven process refined across dozens of deployments.
testimonials: Our process is now a lot quicker and we have more dialogue with customers, leading to associated savings and more opportunities to capture sales. — Anthony Fletcher, COO, VRG (Part of Davies Group)
Selma has already made a tangible difference during the initial project, showing great results and strong potential for our other brands. — Robert Balls, Operations Director, Bikesure
OpenDialog is a leader in technological innovation. This partnership will help agents streamline their sales and service processes. — Dan Garzella, Garzella Group
